# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

- 200
                - 301
              request_method:
                - GET
                - HEAD
              content_type:
                - "application/json"
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 300
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: proxy_cache

          # Route-Level CORS - Broader origins for public read
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "*"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
                - HEAD
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - X-API-Key
                - X-Requested-With
              exposed_headers:
                - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
              credentials: false
              max_age: 7200
              preflight_continue: false

      # Public API - Write Operations
      - name: public-api-write-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/submissions
          - /api/v1/feedback
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting - Stricter for write operations
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 20
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Write operation rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-Level Request Validation
          - name: request-size-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 5
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: true

  # Internal API Service
  - name: internal-api-service
    url: "http://internal-api-upstream:8002"
    protocol: http
    port: 8002
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    plugins:
      # Service-Level JWT Authentication for Internal API
      - name: jwt
        enabled: true
        config:
          uri_param_names:
            - jwt
          cookie_names: []
          key_claim_name: iss
          secret_is_base64: false
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
            - nbf
          run_on_preflight: false
          maximum_expiration: 3600

      # Service-Level ACL for Internal API
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-developers
            - platform-team
            - backend-services
          hide_groups_header: false

      # Service-Level CORS - Restricted for internal apps
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://internal-dashboard.example.com"
            - "https://admin-portal.example.com"
            - "https://monitoring.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Internal-Token
            - X-Correlation-ID
            - X-Team-ID
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Auth-Token
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-Correlation-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 1800
          preflight_continue: false

      # Service-Level Rate Limiting for Internal API
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 15000
          day: 200000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      # Service-Level Request Transformer
      - name: request-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Gateway-Source:kong"
              - "X-Service-Name:internal-api"
              - "X-Internal-Request:true"

    routes:
      # Internal API - Management Routes
      - name: internal-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/internal/manage
          - /api/v1/internal/config
          - /api/v1/internal/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting for Management
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 50
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

          # Route-Level ACL - Only admin teams
          - name: acl
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                - platform-team
              hide_groups_header: false

      # Internal API - Data Routes
      - name: internal-data-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/internal/data
          - /api/v1/internal/reports
          - /api/v1/internal/analytics
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting for Data endpoints
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 200
              hour: 10000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

          # Route-Level Proxy Cache for analytics
          - name: proxy-cache
            enabled: true
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json"
              cache_ttl: 120
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: internal_cache

  # Admin API Service
  - name: admin-api-service
    url: "http://admin-api-upstream:8003"
    protocol: http
    port: 8003
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    plugins:
      # Service-Level OAuth2 Authentication for Admin API
      - name: oauth2
        enabled: true
        config:
          scopes:
            - admin
            - super-admin
            - read-only
          mandatory_scope: true
          enable_authorization_code: true
          enable_client_credentials: true
          enable_implicit_grant: false
          enable_password_grant: false
          token_expiration: 1800
          refresh_token_ttl: 86400
          accept_http_if_already_terminated: true
          global_credentials: false
          auth_header_name: Authorization

      # Service-Level CORS - Very restricted for Admin
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Admin-Token
            - X-CSRF-Token
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Auth-Token
            - X-Request-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 600
          preflight_continue: false

      # Service-Level Strict Rate Limiting for Admin
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 30
          hour: 1000
          day: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Admin API rate limit exceeded. Contact platform team if needed."

      # Service-Level Request Logging for Admin
      - name: http-log
        enabled: true
        config:
          http_endpoint: "http://logging-service:9200/admin-api-logs"
          method: POST
          timeout: 10000
          keepalive: 60000
          content_type: "application/json"

      # Service-Level Response Transformer - Enhanced security headers for Admin
      - name: response-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
              - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
              - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"
              - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"
              - "Content-Security-Policy:default-src 'self'"
              - "Referrer-Policy:no-referrer"
              - "Permissions-Policy:camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()"

    routes:
      # Admin API - User Management
      - name: admin-user-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/users
          - /api/v1/admin/roles
          - /api/v1/admin/permissions
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting - Very strict for user management
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 15
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "User management rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-Level IP Restriction - Only office IPs
          - name: ip-restriction
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                - "203.0.113.0/24"
                - "198.51.100.0/24"
                - "10.10.0.0/16"
              status: 403
              message: "Access restricted to authorized networks only."

      # Admin API - System Configuration
      - name: admin-system-config-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/system
          - /api/v1/admin/settings
          - /api/v1/admin/maintenance
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting - Strictest for system config
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 10
              hour: 100
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "System configuration rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-Level IP Restriction - Only specific admin IPs
          - name: ip-restriction
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                - "203.0.113.10"
                - "203.0.113.11"
                - "10.10.1.0/24"
              status: 403
              message: "System configuration access is highly restricted."

      # Admin API - Audit Logs (Read-Only)
      - name: admin-audit-logs-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/audit
          - /api/v1/admin/logs
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Rate Limiting for Audit Logs
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 30
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

          # Route-Level Proxy Cache for Audit Logs
          - name: proxy-cache
            enabled: true
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json"
              cache_ttl: 60
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: audit_cache

  # Webhook Service
  - name: webhook-service
    url: "http://webhook-upstream:8004"
    protocol: http
    port: 8004
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    plugins:
      # Service-Level HMAC Authentication for Webhooks
      - name: hmac-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          clock_skew: 300
          validate_request_body: true
          enforce_headers:
            - date
            - digest
          algorithms:
            - hmac-sha256
            - hmac-sha384
            - hmac-sha512

      # Service-Level CORS for Webhook callbacks
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://partner1.example.com"
            - "https://partner2.example.com"
            - "https://webhook-provider.example.com"
          methods:
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
            - X-Webhook-Signature
            - X-Webhook-ID
            - X-Webhook-Timestamp
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      # Service-Level Rate Limiting for Webhooks
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 10000
          day: 100000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Webhook rate limit exceeded. Retry with exponential backoff."

    routes:
      - name: webhook-inbound-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/webhooks/inbound
          - /api/v1/webhooks/callback
        methods:
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-Level Request Size Limiting for Webhooks
          - name: request-size-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 2
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: true

# Consumers for authentication
consumers:
  - username: public-api-consumer
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: public-api-key-001
      - key: public-api-key-002
    acls:
      - group: public-users

  - username: internal-developer
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: internal-dev-iss
        secret: internal-dev-jwt-secret-change-me
        algorithm: HS256
    acls:
      - group: internal-developers

  - username: platform-admin
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: platform-admin-iss
        secret: platform-admin-jwt-secret-change-me
        algorithm: HS256
    acls:
      - group: platform-team
      - group: internal-developers

  - username: backend-service-account
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: backend-svc-iss
        secret: backend-svc-jwt-secret-change-me
        algorithm: HS256
    acls:
      - group: backend-services
      - group: internal-developers

  - username: webhook-partner-1
    hmacauth_credentials:
      - username: partner1
        secret: webhook-partner1-hmac-secret-change-me

  - username: webhook-partner-2
    hmacauth_credentials:
      - username: partner2
        secret: webhook-partner2-hmac-secret-change-me

# Upstreams with health checks
upstreams:
  - name: public-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "public-api-1:8001"
        weight: 100
      - target: "public-api-2:8001"
        weight: 100

  - name: internal-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "internal-api-1:8002"
        weight: 100
      - target: "internal-api-2:8002"
        weight: 100

  - name: admin-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        healthy:
          interval: 15
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "admin-api-1:8003"
        weight: 100

  - name: webhook-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 3
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "webhook-handler-1:8004"
        weight: 100
      - target: "webhook-handler-2:8004"
        weight: 100
